name: Cinnamon Mini Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and allspice.
2. In a separate bowl, lightly beat the egg, then mix in milk and melted butter until well combined.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients just until moistened.
4. Spoon batter evenly into greased or paper-lined mini muffin cups.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 12-14 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. For topping, mix together sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl.
7. Brush the tops of warm muffins with melted butter, then sprinkle evenly with the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
Nutritional Information: 96 calories, 128 mg. sodium, 9 mg. cholesterol, 12 gm. carbohydrates, 1 gm. protein, 5 gm. fat.
Makes: 2 dozen
